changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: Deactivate all test sections not in the 13 AHRI departments (keyed by stable name)
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.test_section SET is_active = 'N' WHERE name NOT IN ( 'Hematology', 'Clinical Chemistry', 'Immunology', 'Microbiology', 'Molecular Biology', 'Parasitology', 'Serology', 'Virology', 'Pathology', 'Biosafety', 'Data Management', 'Quality Assurance', 'Research' );
